name: Claude
browser_login_instructions: Go to {url}. Click 'Log in' or 'Continue with email'. Enter the email address: {email}. Click 'Continue'. Enter the password: {password}. Click 'Sign in' or 'Continue'. If a verification code is required, wait for the email and enter the code. Once logged in, dismiss any onboarding tooltips or usage notices.
browser_setup_instructions: If a login page appears and no credentials are available, the test cannot proceed — type 'LOGIN_REQUIRED' in the response and stop. If already logged in, dismiss any onboarding tooltips, cookie consent banners, or usage limit notices by clicking through them.
browser_chat_instructions: Find the message input box at the bottom of the page, click on it, type the message, and press Enter or click the send arrow to send it.
browser_overlay_hint: Only capture NEW modals or popups that appeared AFTER you sent the message. Do NOT include the persistent sidebar, model selector, or any static UI elements.
